hypothesis: On US500 M15, a 40-bar Donchian breakout with ADX(14) > 20 captures index momentum bursts with positive expectancy at 2.5R; trend regime filter prevents whipsaw in chop.

entry_rules.long: close > donchian_high_40[1] AND adx_14 > 20 AND close > ema_100
entry_rules.short: close < donchian_low_40[1]  AND adx_14 > 20 AND close < ema_100
entry_rules.note: Use prior-bar Donchian to avoid repaint. Single-bar trigger, no multi-bar confirm.

regime_filter.comment: Trend gate only. Do NOT also require ATR percentile -- too conjunctive in prior gen.

session_filter.comment: US cash session only; US500 overnight is thin.

diagnostics.data_plumbing_check: CONFIRM US500 bars actually load; prior gen produced 0 trades suggesting missing symbol feed.
